message:
feat(profile): PGO call profiling via --profile-out for function selection

Add JS_CallInternal instrumentation hook in QuickJS patch:
  edgebox_call_profile_increment(func_name, line_num) counts every
  function call when profiling is enabled, before frozen dispatch.

Add --profile-out=<path> support to native_main_static.zig:
  Intercepts flag from args, enables call_profile, dumps JSON on exit.
  Profile format: {"name@line": count} sorted by frequency descending.

Usage:
  # Phase 1: Collect profile
  ./_tsc --profile-out=profile.json --noEmit app.ts
  # Phase 2: Rebuild with PGO
  edgeboxc --freeze-profile=profile.json --freeze-max-functions=200 app.js

TSC profile: 2,342 functions, top: charCodeUnchecked (1.45M calls).
PGO freeze-all: 166.3MB/6.06s (vs 186.4MB/7.34s without PGO).
